# openapi

```go
import "github.com/agentstation/starmap/internal/embedded/openapi"
```

Package openapi embeds the OpenAPI 3.0 specification files for the Starmap HTTP API. These files are embedded at build time and served by the API server at runtime.

## Index

- [Variables](<#variables>)


## Variables

<a name="SpecJSON"></a>SpecJSON contains the OpenAPI 3.0 specification in JSON format. Served at: GET /api/v1/openapi.json

```go
var SpecJSON []byte
```

<a name="SpecYAML"></a>SpecYAML contains the OpenAPI 3.0 specification in YAML format. Served at: GET /api/v1/openapi.yaml

```go
var SpecYAML []byte
```
